title: Payment Gateway Outage — Elevated Error Rates
root_cause: Database connection pool exhaustion due to sudden traffic spike from flash sale
resolution: Increased max_connections from 50 to 200 and added connection pooling with PgBouncer

timeline.content: Error rate spiked to 45% on payment-gateway. PagerDuty alert triggered.
Alice Wang acknowledged alert. Payments Squad paged.
Identified database connection pool exhaustion. 50 connections saturated, 800+ queued.
Increased max_connections to 200. Rolled out PgBouncer sidecar.
Error rate dropped to 2%. Service stabilizing.
All metrics normal. Incident resolved.

title: User Service Latency Spike — Redis Cluster Failover
root_cause: Redis cluster node failure triggered automatic failover with cache miss storm
resolution: Pre-warmed cache after failover and added Redis sentinel monitoring alerts

timeline.content: P99 latency on user-service spiked from 50ms to 4500ms. Datadog alert fired.
Bob Martinez investigating.
Redis cluster primary node went down. Automatic failover to replica completed. Cache miss storm in progress.
Cache warming job triggered. Redis sentinel monitoring enabled.
Latency dropping to 120ms P99. Cache hit rate recovering.
All services normal. Redis cluster stable.

title: Notification Delivery Failure — SES Rate Limit
root_cause: AWS SES sending rate limit exceeded during promotional campaign
resolution: Implemented exponential backoff and requested SES rate limit increase from 50/s to 500/s

timeline.content: Promotional campaign started. 200k emails queued.
SES returned Throttling errors. Delivery queue backing up.
Carol Chen investigating SES rate limits.
Implemented exponential backoff and queuing. Requested SES rate limit increase.
Backlog clearing. Delivery rate recovering.
All emails delivered. Rate limit increase approved.

title: Search Service Degraded — Elasticsearch Cluster Yellow
root_cause: One Elasticsearch data node ran out of disk space during reindexing
resolution: Added disk space and rebalanced shards across nodes

timeline.content: Search response times increased by 200%. Partial results for some queries.
Eve Thompson investigating.
ES cluster status yellow. One data node disk 97% full.
Cleared old indices. Freed 40GB disk space. Cluster back to green.
Search performance restored. Added disk monitoring alert.

title: Inventory Sync Failure — Warehouse API Timeout
root_cause: Third-party warehouse API timeout during peak hours
resolution: Pending — evaluating fallback cache and retry strategy

timeline.content: Inventory sync job failed. Warehouse API returned 504 Gateway Timeout.
Dave Kim investigating.
Third-party API consistently timing out between 16:00-17:00 UTC. Likely their peak load.
